ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vhosts" (
  "vhost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vhost */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client managing the vhost */,
  "vhost_name" TEXT /* Name of the vhost */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name associated with the vhost */,
  "ssl_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if SSL is enabled */,
  "custom_cert" TEXT /* Custom SSL certificate for the vhost */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vhost was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vhost was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the vhost is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vhost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhosts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "billing_info" TEXT /* Billing information of the client */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the client signed up for the service */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Plan type the client is subscribed to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API configuration */,
  "vhost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vhost the configuration belongs to */,
  "v2" INTEGER /* Flag to use V2 of the service (0 for V1, 1 for V2) */,
  "recaptcha_token" TEXT /* Optional reCAPTCHA token for added security */,
  "recaptcha_secret_key" TEXT /* reCAPTCHA secret key */,
  "ttl" INTEGER /* Time-to-live (TTL) for URLs */,
  "allowed_origins" TEXT /* Allowed origins for CORS */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_config_vhost_id FOREIGN KEY ("vhost_id") REFERENCES vhosts ("vhost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "vhost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vhost the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the CDN */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last accessed */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file */,
  "file_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the file */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location of the file in storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_vhost_id FOREIGN KEY ("vhost_id") REFERENCES vhosts ("vhost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_data" (
  "file_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file data entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "file_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing file information */,
  "request_headers" TEXT /* Headers of the API request */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the API request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_data_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "vhost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vhost the request is for */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* Endpoint of the API request */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was made */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the API response */,
  "response_headers" TEXT /* Headers of the API response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_vhost_id FOREIGN KEY ("vhost_id") REFERENCES vhosts ("vhost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "url_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL token */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the token is for */,
  "token_value" TEXT /* Value of the URL token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of the URL token (e.g., download, preview) */,
  "token_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the URL token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_url_tokens_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_logins" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
